description: Quantify mitochondrial network morphology in the fluorescence microscopy image located at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/mitochondria/mitochondria_raw.tif. Preprocess and segment the image to isolate the mitochondrial network. Calculate shape descriptors, specifically Aspect Ratio (AR) and Form Factor (Circularity), and save these measurements to ~/Fiji_Data/results/mitochondria/shape_metrics.csv. Perform a network topology analysis by skeletonizing the binary image and save the resulting skeleton metrics to ~/Fiji_Data/results/mitochondria/skeleton_metrics.csv. Additionally, save the labeled skeleton map visualization to ~/Fiji_Data/results/mitochondria/skeleton_map.png.
